articles.title: Helping disaster response teams turn AI into action across Asia

articles.title: STADLER reshapes knowledge work at a 230-year-old company
articles.summary: Learn how STADLER uses ChatGPT to transform knowledge work, saving time and accelerating productivity across 650 employees.

articles.title: Inside our approach to the Model Spec
articles.summary: Learn how OpenAI’s Model Spec serves as a public framework for model behavior, balancing safety, user freedom, and accountability as AI systems advance.

articles.title: Introducing the OpenAI Safety Bug Bounty program
articles.summary: OpenAI launches a Safety Bug Bounty program to identify AI abuse and safety risks, including agentic vulnerabilities, prompt injection, and data exfiltration.

articles.title: Helping developers build safer AI experiences for teens
articles.summary: OpenAI releases prompt-based teen safety policies for developers using gpt-oss-safeguard, helping moderate age-specific risks in AI systems.

articles.title: Update on the OpenAI Foundation
articles.summary: The OpenAI Foundation announces plans to invest at least $1 billion in curing diseases, economic opportunity, AI resilience, and community programs.

articles.title: Powering product discovery in ChatGPT
articles.summary: ChatGPT introduces richer, visually immersive shopping powered by the Agentic Commerce Protocol, enabling product discovery, side-by-side comparisons, and merchant integration.

articles.title: Creating with Sora Safely
articles.summary: To address the novel safety challenges posed by a state-of-the-art video model as well as a new social creation platform, we’ve built Sora 2 and the Sora app with safety at the foundation. Our approach is anchored in concrete protections.

articles.title: How we monitor internal coding agents for misalignment
articles.summary: How OpenAI uses chain-of-thought monitoring to study misalignment in internal coding agents—analyzing real-world deployments to detect risks and strengthen AI safety safeguards.

articles.title: OpenAI to acquire Astral
articles.summary: Accelerates Codex growth to power the next generation of Python developer tools

articles.title: Introducing GPT-5.4 mini and nano
articles.summary: GPT-5.4 mini and nano are smaller, faster versions of GPT-5.4 optimized for coding, tool use, multimodal reasoning, and high-volume API and sub-agent workloads.

articles.title: OpenAI Japan announces Japan Teen Safety Blueprint to put teen safety first
articles.summary: OpenAI Japan announces the Japan Teen Safety Blueprint, introducing stronger age protections, parental controls, and well-being safeguards for teens using generative AI.

articles.title: Equipping workers with insights about compensation
articles.summary: New research shows Americans send nearly 3 million daily messages to ChatGPT asking about compensation and earnings, helping close the wage information gap.

articles.title: Why Codex Security Doesn’t Include a SAST Report
articles.summary: A deep dive into why Codex Security doesn’t rely on traditional SAST, instead using AI-driven constraint reasoning and validation to find real vulnerabilities with fewer false positives.

articles.title: Rakuten fixes issues twice as fast with Codex
articles.summary: Rakuten uses Codex, the coding agent from OpenAI, to ship software faster and safer, reducing MTTR 50%, automating CI/CD reviews, and delivering full-stack builds in weeks.

articles.title: Designing AI agents to resist prompt injection
articles.summary: How ChatGPT defends against prompt injection and social engineering by constraining risky actions and protecting sensitive data in agent workflows.

articles.title: From model to agent: Equipping the Responses API with a computer environment
articles.summary: How OpenAI built an agent runtime using the Responses API, shell tool, and hosted containers to run secure, scalable agents with files, tools, and state.

articles.title: Wayfair boosts catalog accuracy and support speed with OpenAI
articles.summary: Wayfair uses OpenAI models to improve ecommerce support and product catalog accuracy, automating ticket triage and enhancing millions of product attributes at scale.

articles.title: Improving instruction hierarchy in frontier LLMs
articles.summary: IH-Challenge trains models to prioritize trusted instructions, improving instruction hierarchy, safety steerability, and resistance to prompt injection attacks.

articles.title: New ways to learn math and science in ChatGPT
articles.summary: ChatGPT introduces interactive visual explanations for math and science, helping students explore formulas, variables, and concepts in real time.

articles.title: OpenAI to acquire Promptfoo
articles.summary: OpenAI is acquiring Promptfoo, an AI security platform that helps enterprises identify and remediate vulnerabilities in AI systems during development.

articles.title: Codex Security: now in research preview
articles.summary: Codex Security is an AI application security agent that analyzes project context to detect, validate, and patch complex vulnerabilities with higher confidence and less noise.

articles.title: How Descript enables multilingual video dubbing at scale
articles.summary: Descript uses OpenAI models to scale multilingual video dubbing, optimizing translations for both meaning and timing so dubbed speech sounds natural across languages.

articles.title: How Balyasny Asset Management built an AI research engine for investing
articles.summary: See how Balyasny built an AI research system with GPT-5.4, rigorous model evaluation, and agent workflows to transform investment analysis at scale.

articles.title: Introducing GPT-5.4
articles.summary: Introducing GPT-5.4, OpenAI’s most most capable and efficient frontier model for professional work, with state-of-the-art coding, computer use, tool search, and 1M-token context.

articles.title: GPT-5.4 Thinking System Card
Reasoning models struggle to control their chains of thought, and that’s good
articles.summary: OpenAI introduces CoT-Control and finds reasoning models struggle to control their chains of thought, reinforcing monitorability as an AI safety safeguard.

articles.title: Ensuring AI use in education leads to opportunity
articles.summary: OpenAI shares new tools, certifications, and measurement resources to help schools and universities close AI capability gaps and expand opportunity.

articles.title: Introducing ChatGPT for Excel and new financial data integrations
articles.summary: OpenAI introduces ChatGPT for Excel and new financial app integrations, powered by GPT-5.4 to accelerate modeling, research, and analysis in regulated environments.

articles.title: Introducing the Adoption news channel
articles.summary: Practical insights and frameworks to turn AI progress into business advantage

articles.title: VfL Wolfsburg turns ChatGPT into a club-wide capability
articles.summary: By focusing on people, not pilots, the Bundesliga club is scaling efficiency, creativity, and knowledge—without losing its football identity.

articles.title: The five AI value models driving business reinvention
articles.summary: Five AI value models show how leaders can sequence AI from workforce fluency to process reinvention and build durable business advantage.

articles.title: Extending single-minus amplitudes to gravitons
articles.summary: A new preprint extends single-minus amplitudes to gravitons, with GPT-5.2 Pro helping derive and verify nonzero graviton tree amplitudes in quantum gravity.

articles.title: Understanding AI and learning outcomes
articles.summary: OpenAI introduces the Learning Outcomes Measurement Suite to assess AI’s impact on student learning across diverse educational environments over time.

articles.title: How Axios uses AI to help deliver high-impact local journalism
articles.summary: Axios COO Allison Murphy explains how the company uses AI to support local reporters, streamline newsroom workflows, and deliver high-impact local journalism at scale.

articles.title: GPT-5.3 Instant System Card
GPT-5.3 Instant: Smoother, more useful everyday conversations
Our agreement with the Department of War
articles.summary: Details on OpenAI’s contract with the Department of War, outlining safety red lines, legal protections, and how AI systems will be deployed in classified environments.

articles.title: Introducing the Stateful Runtime Environment for Agents in Amazon Bedrock
articles.summary: Stateful Runtime for Agents in Amazon Bedrock brings persistent orchestration, memory, and secure execution to multi-step AI workflows powered by OpenAI.

articles.title: Joint Statement from OpenAI and Microsoft
articles.summary: Microsoft and OpenAI continue to work closely across research, engineering, and product development, building on years of deep collaboration and shared success.

articles.title: Scaling AI for everyone
articles.summary: Today we’re announcing $110B in new investment at a $730B pre money valuation. This includes $30B from SoftBank, $30B from NVIDIA, and $50B from Amazon.

articles.title: OpenAI and Amazon announce strategic partnership
articles.summary: OpenAI and Amazon announce a strategic partnership bringing OpenAI’s Frontier platform to AWS, expanding AI infrastructure, custom models, and enterprise AI agents.

articles.title: An update on our mental health-related work
articles.summary: OpenAI shares updates on its mental health safety work, including parental controls, trusted contacts, improved distress detection, and recent litigation developments.

articles.title: Pacific Northwest National Laboratory and OpenAI partner to accelerate federal permitting
articles.summary: OpenAI and Pacific Northwest National Laboratory introduce DraftNEPABench, a new benchmark evaluating how AI coding agents can accelerate federal permitting—showing potential to reduce NEPA drafting time by up to 15% and modernize infrastructure reviews.

articles.title: OpenAI Codex and Figma launch seamless code-to-design experience
articles.summary: OpenAI and Figma launch a new Codex integration that connects code and design, enabling teams to move between implementation and the Figma canvas to iterate and ship faster.

articles.title: Disrupting malicious uses of AI | February 2026
articles.summary: Our latest threat report examines how malicious actors combine AI models with websites and social platforms—and what it means for detection and defense.

articles.title: Arvind KC appointed Chief People Officer
articles.summary: OpenAI appoints Arvind KC as Chief People Officer to help scale the company, strengthen its culture, and lead how work evolves in the age of AI.

articles.title: Why we no longer evaluate SWE-bench Verified
articles.summary: SWE-bench Verified is increasingly contaminated and mismeasures frontier coding progress. Our analysis shows flawed tests and training leakage. We recommend SWE-bench Pro.

articles.title: OpenAI announces Frontier Alliance Partners
articles.summary: OpenAI announces Frontier Alliance Partners to help enterprises move from AI pilots to production with secure, scalable agent deployments.

articles.title: Our First Proof submissions
articles.summary: We share our AI model’s proof attempts for the First Proof math challenge, testing research-grade reasoning on expert-level problems.
